creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
tabthorpe    2007-12-29 15:03:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/zenphoto         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/zenphoto/files   pkg-deinstall.in pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Zenphoto is an answer to lots of calls for an online gallery solution
  that just makes sense. After years of bloated software that does
  everything and your dishes, zenphoto just shows your photos, simply.
  
  WWW: http://www.zenphoto.org/
  
  PR:             ports/119072
  Submitted by:   Philippe Audeoud <jadawin at tuxaco.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1932    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/www/zenphoto/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/zenphoto/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/www/zenphoto/files/pkg-deinstall.in (new)
  1.1       +16 -0     ports/www/zenphoto/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/zenphoto/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +231 -0    ports/www/zenphoto/pkg-plist (new)
